purpose: Open Android Emulator session for manual server-wide local backend testing with a real Codex provider instead of deterministic fake-provider replies.

mobile_repo.head: 52a0ab0 test: support manual server-wide emulator session

source_worktree.head: 227e2963 fix: resolve mobile artifacts from gateway file store

android_emulator.app_profile: debug paired gateway profile seeded by tools/mobile_server_wide_emulator_smoke.py

manual_test_instructions: In the open emulator, select either test_ccb2_beta or test_ccb2_alpha on the first page.
Type a question and tap the green send button.
Wait for the Codex-provider reply; this lane is intentionally not the deterministic fake-provider smoke.
remaining_risks: The source worktree still needs review/merge before this is product-landed.
Physical Tailnet/relay smoke is still separate from the local emulator lane.
Live Codex-provider latency is not deterministic; automated acceptance uses deterministic provider assertions while this manual lane proves the non-fake provider path is available.
